title: Crazy AE2 Addons
description: This mod adds useful enhancements to Applied Energistics 2, including automatic crafting cancelation, NBT-based exports, and enchanting automation. Currently in early beta.
body:
## [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1223804/description_bea4b885-e8c5-49e1-98fc-d69c2d741123.png)](https://discord.gg/mWy8AVRtwz)

# Crazy AE2 Addons

## [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/mWy8AVRtwz)

## check out the [tutorial series](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLB8Rr5Xojkr5T1qoPr_4JdETiBkF4qF6r) on YouTube.

Ever wished you could store your Minecraft dog inside your AE2 system? Now you can! Tired of running out of pattern slots in your Pattern Provider? Not anymore - and if you want fewer slots, that’s possible too. Crazy AE2 Addons brings you features no one ever imagined.

### Highlights:

*   Immersive Portals optional integration for the Wormhole P2P tunnel, remote interractions made easy. (To enable, download the library from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/crazy-ae2-addons/version/2.0.12) and enable that feature in the config)
*   Massive multiblock structures capable of generating insane amounts of power, farming mobs, and much more.
*   The **BIGGEST** Pattern Provider ever made - upgrade its capacity to hold thousands of patterns! It even keeps them when picked up, making moving your setup effortless.
*   Custom displays to show your resources in real time, greet you with messages, or form huge multi-block screens. With markdown support, color options, and seamless tiling - your system will never look boring again.
*   Entity Ticker - speed up processing like never before (comes with a great electricity bill).
*   Multi level emitter - no more big emitter contraptions, now everything is in a single part.
*   Mob Storage Cells - store thousands of living entities in your ME Network. Pair them with digital mob farm multiblocks for maximum chaos. They also work with pattern providers now!
*   Automatic Enchanting - turn all that extra liquid XP into guaranteed enchantments. Full automation supported!

### Prefer the technical side of things?

All features are simple to use, but if you want, you can go deep. Crazy AE2 Addons includes:

*   An automatic builder - write your own scripts, or copy entire structures.
*   Tons of redstone integration - trigger crafts with a button, integrate signals everywhere.
*   Tag view cells, NBT Storage Bus with advanced matching logic, even a built-in calculator.

### Everything is documented in-game

No wikis required - the **AE2 Guide** has it all. Recipes are fully integrated into JEI/EMI with detailed previews. Multiblock controllers even include a real-time hologram preview for easy building. And if you ever need more help, just join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mWy8AVRtwz). Or check out the [tutorial series](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLB8Rr5Xojkr5T1qoPr_4JdETiBkF4qF6r) on YouTube.

### Upgraded Crafting CPUs!

*   Set CPU priority and change their names (instantly).
*   Sorted by priority directly in your terminal.
*   Cancel all crafts with one button.
*   New pattern options - including Ignore NBT, allowing you to craft things like Ad Astra’s oxygen tanks.

### Compatibility

Crazy AE2 Addons plays nicely with many AE2 expansions and popular mods:

*   Modern AE2 Additions
*   Advanced AE
*   Extended AE
*   Expanded AE
*   Mega Cells
*   Apotheosis (Auto Enchanter supports its enchantments)
*   Applied Mek/Ars/Bot

***
